payload.summary: BP export automation: Playwright script built at ~/workspace/scripts/morning-digest/bp_export.py. Login works, Insights>Listings navigation works, Reservations switch works. Steps: login → Insights → Listings → switch Performance to Reservations → change 'View Data for' to Calendar Year → Download. Couldn't test download step because BP had server errors on 2026-05-13. Test when BP is stable.
